description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Auditory, Concentrate, Incapacitation, Occult, Mental

You hum a haunting melody from beyond the grave that lulls the living into sleep. All living creatures within 30 feet must attempt a Will save (DC 10 + your level + your Charisma modifier). Undead and constructs are unaffected.

ResultEffect
Critical SuccessNo effect
SuccessStupefied 1 until the start of your next turn
FailureUnconscious for 1 round (wakes if damaged)
Critical FailureUnconscious for 1 minute (wakes if damaged; DC 15 Perception to wake normally)

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
